series.title: Vikings 2026!
series.tagline: Saga-era honor collides with deep-space survival.
series.shortDescription: A lost Norse expedition returns from a wormhole with living star-charts, pulling modern factions into a brutal contest over ancestry, faith, and control of the frontier lanes.

series.title: Stardust Station
series.tagline: Every ship can dock. Not every crew leaves whole.
series.shortDescription: On the largest neutral transfer hub in contested space, dispatchers, engineers, and medics hold together fragile truces while spies, refugees, and war fleets cycle through the same airlocks.

series.title: Azure Reach
series.tagline: An ocean world keeps its oldest maps underwater.
series.shortDescription: Explorers chart a planet of floating citadels and abyssal ruins where each discovery rewrites human history and forces uneasy alliances between scientists, locals, and extraction guilds.

series.title: Sunforge Outlaw
series.tagline: In the furnace lanes, rebellion is forged at stellar heat.
series.shortDescription: Branded a traitor by a solar-industrial regime, a former forge pilot hijacks core convoys and sparks worker uprisings across orbiting foundries powered directly by a captive star.
